name: lifecare-plus
description: LifeCare+ Healthcare Platform - Full-stack MERN application

scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && npm run db:wait && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev: sh scripts/ensure-mongo-for-dev.sh && npm run kill-api-port && concurrently -k "npm run dev -w backend" "sh scripts/wait-for-api.sh && npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run kill-api-port && npm run dev -w backend
scripts.dev:no-docker: npm run kill-api-port && concurrently -k "npm run dev -w backend" "sh scripts/wait-for-api.sh && npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.vercel:build: npm run build:vercel -w frontend && rm -rf dist && cp -R frontend/dist dist
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
